message:
feat(rch): add cargo bench support for remote benchmark execution

Implements transparent interception and remote execution of cargo bench
commands:

- Add CargoBench variant to CompilationKind enum
- Classify "cargo bench" as CargoBench with 0.90 confidence
- Map CargoBench to RequiredRuntime::Rust for worker selection
- Use test artifact patterns (includes target/criterion/**) for
  benchmark results, avoiding full target/ directory transfer

Benchmarks, like tests, stream their output and only need result
artifacts returned. Criterion benchmark results are included in the
existing test artifact patterns.

Includes 7 comprehensive tests covering:
- Basic classification
- Benchmarks with name filters and flags
- Wrapped commands (time, env vars)
- Serialization and distinction from CargoTest
- Piped command rejection

Closes: remote_compilation_helper-8o52

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -753,6 +753,7 @@ pub(crate) fn required_runtime_for_kind(kind: Option<CompilationKind>) -> Requir
             | CompilationKind::CargoClippy
             | CompilationKind::CargoDoc
             | CompilationKind::CargoNextest
+            | CompilationKind::CargoBench
             | CompilationKind::Rustc => RequiredRuntime::Rust,
 
             CompilationKind::BunTest | CompilationKind::BunTypecheck => RequiredRuntime::Bun,
@@ -773,10 +774,10 @@ fn get_artifact_patterns(kind: Option<CompilationKind>) -> Vec<String> {
         Some(CompilationKind::BunTest) | Some(CompilationKind::BunTypecheck) => {
             default_bun_artifact_patterns()
         }
-        // Test commands only need coverage/results artifacts, not full target/
-        Some(CompilationKind::CargoTest) | Some(CompilationKind::CargoNextest) => {
-            default_rust_test_artifact_patterns()
-        }
+        // Test and bench commands only need coverage/results artifacts, not full target/
+        Some(CompilationKind::CargoTest)
+        | Some(CompilationKind::CargoNextest)
+        | Some(CompilationKind::CargoBench) => default_rust_test_artifact_patterns(),
         Some(CompilationKind::Rustc)
         | Some(CompilationKind::CargoBuild)
         | Some(CompilationKind::CargoCheck)
